title: Vacancy for Teacher at LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners
company: LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
We at LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Teacher based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners:
LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners!
